overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character traverses elevated walkways, descends ramps, and walks along streets lined with palm trees and holographic advertisements, transitioning from an open platform to covered arcades and finally an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian platform with yellow railings

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position
character turns left while continuing to walk along the platform

agents.ego_description: character walks along the elevated platform, passing the large pink sun neon sign and turning left toward the descent ramps

entered.detail: large spiky pink neon sun sculpture mounted on building facade
bright yellow safety railings lining the elevated walkway edges
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character begins on an elevated pedestrian platform with distinctive yellow railings, walking past a large pink neon sun sculpture. The open sky above shows the deep blue of dusk, while futuristic glass skyscrapers rise in the background. The character turns left and continues walking toward the descent ramps.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with palm tree median and neon billboards

events.description: descends from elevated platform to street level via concrete ramps
moves into shadow of tall buildings as natural light fades

agents.ego_description: character walks down ramps from the platform to street level, continuing along the palm-lined sidewalk with neon advertisements visible on surrounding buildings

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street median in planters
large vertical billboard with prominent pink neon text reading WET DREAM
ground floor storefronts with glowing neon signage and entrances

segments.scene_description: The character descends concrete ramps from the elevated platform to street level, entering a wide-open urban street lined with palm trees. The environment transitions from open sky to the shadow of towering skyscrapers adorned with massive neon billboards. Sparse vehicle traffic moves on the adjacent road as the character walks along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with dynamic colored lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway with overhead colored lighting changing from green to yellow
overhead canopy lighting shifts from green to warm yellow-orange

agents.ego_description: character walks under the covered arcade with shifting colored lights overhead, passing other pedestrians and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large red and white neon sign reading CIRKUS on building wall
glowing green cube-shaped holographic display showing rotating graphics
overhead structure with panels emitting shifting green and yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway where the sky is mostly blocked by an overhead canopy. The lighting becomes predominantly artificial with panels shifting between green and yellow hues. A large red CIRKUS neon sign dominates the left wall while a green holographic kiosk glows on the right. The crowd density increases slightly with pedestrians walking in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge overlooking multi-lane traffic

events.description: emerges from covered walkway onto elevated pedestrian bridge with open sides
vehicles pass on the multi-lane street visible below the pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: character walks along the pedestrian bridge overlooking traffic below, with tall skyscrapers rising on both sides of the street

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving on the multi-lane street below the bridge

entered.detail: metal safety railings along the edge of the elevated walkway
busy street with multiple lanes of traffic visible below the bridge level
large concrete structure spanning across the street with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character walks onto an elevated pedestrian bridge with open sides overlooking a busy multi-lane street. The perspective shifts to show traffic moving below while massive skyscrapers with glowing advertisements flank both sides of the street. The lighting returns to a mix of natural dusk and artificial neon as the character continues across the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open elevated platform down into a neon-lit urban corridor before ascending onto a bustling pedestrian bridge. It begins on a high walkway with yellow railings and a pink neon sun sculpture under a deep blue dusk sky, moving forward as the character turns toward a series of descent ramps. As the camera follows the character down to street level, the open sky gives way to the shadows of towering skyscrapers and palm-lined sidewalks with sparse vehicle traffic. The scene then shifts into a covered pedestrian walkway where natural light is replaced by artificial green and yellow panels, passing a glowing red CIRKUS sign and holographic kiosks amidst a growing crowd. Finally, the camera emerges from the canopy onto an elevated bridge, opening the perspective once more to reveal multi-lane traffic below and massive glowing advertisements flanking the street.
